compile.command: deno run -RE -W=. --allow-sys --allow-ffi npm:@swc/cli/swc -C jsc.parser.syntax=typescript -C jsc.parser.decorators=true -C jsc.transform.decoratorVersion='2022-03' -C env.targets.node=23 -o dist/compiled.js dist/bundle.js

componentize.command: node ./node_modules/@bytecodealliance/jco/src/jco.js componentize --wit wit/ --world-name ifc --disable http --out dist/org_agent.wasm dist/compiled.js
